description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese katana with a gently curved, single-edged blade and a matching scabbard. The blade is long and slender, tapering to a fine point, and appears to be made of polished metal. The handle is straight and cylindrical, likely wrapped for grip, and is separated from the blade by a prominent rectangular guard. The scabbard mirrors the curvature of the blade and is designed to fully enclose it when sheathed. Both the blade and scabbard are rendered in a dark, uniform color, giving the object a sleek and minimalist appearance. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on the blade, handle, or guard.
description: A sleek, curved katana sword with a matching scabbard, featuring a straight handle and a rectangular guard, all in a dark finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade and scabbard, with the handle and guard clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature of the blade and scabbard, and the thickness of the handle and guard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the alignment of the blade and scabbard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the continuous curve of the blade and scabbard, with the handle partially obscured.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, likely wrapped handle with no visible ornamentation
